name: vitrus-css
description: VitrusCSS — a Bootstrap 5-compatible component library with a glassmorphism design language. Sass-authored, CSS-variable driven, dark-mode ready. Bundles @popperjs/core for overlay positioning.

scripts.predev: npm run setup && npm run build:js && npm run docs:html && node scripts/copy-bundle.mjs docs-dist
scripts.prebuild:docs: npm run setup && npm run docs:html
scripts.postbuild:docs: node scripts/copy-bundle.mjs demo && npm run clean:dev
scripts.build:css: npm run build:css:expanded && npm run build:css:min
scripts.build:js: npm run build:js:expanded && npm run build:js:min
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js && npm run build:docs
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:js -- --fix && npm run lint:css -- --fix
